description_long: This is a two-seater couch with a robust, classic design, upholstered in dark, slightly glossy leather. The seat features two large, separate cushions, while the backrest is divided into two plush, attached cushions that provide ample support. The armrests are wide, rounded, and generously padded, giving the couch a traditional and inviting appearance. The base is supported by four short, exposed wooden legs, which are dark and cylindrical, adding to the sturdy look. The upholstery is smooth with subtle creases and a slightly worn texture, suggesting comfort and durability. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements, emphasizing a straightforward, functional style.
description: A dark leather two-seater couch with wide, rolled armrests, plush divided cushions, and short exposed wooden legs. The surface is smooth with subtle creases, giving it a classic, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large seat cushions, two attached back cushions, and wide, rolled armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, slightly contoured backrest and the solid, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and the profile of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, separate seat cushions and two attached, divided back cushions; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark leather with a smooth surface and subtle natural creasing; no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed, cylindrical wooden legs with a dark finish; legs are sturdy and slightly rounded.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, rolled armrests that are heavily padded and extend outward from the seat; covered in the same leather upholstery.
attribute_backrest_type: High, attached, divided backrest with two plush sections; slightly contoured and cushioned for support.
